summary.en: Business Intelligence Developer (SQL, Power BI) role at Base.com, a fast-scaling e-commerce platform with integrations for Amazon, eBay, Shopify, DHL and FedEx. The position involves taking a key role in data reporting and analytics for an international team spanning Europe and the Americas.
summary.lv: Business Intelligence izstrādātāja (SQL, Power BI) amats Base.com, strauji augošā e-komercijas platformā ar integrācijām Amazon, eBay, Shopify, DHL un FedEx. Amats paredz galveno lomu datu pārskatu un analītikas jomā starptautiskai komandai, kas aptver Eiropu un Ameriku.
